title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: NW FURNITURE BANK VANCOUVER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Launder and wash housewares donations prior to pick up. All items must be in good reuseable condition, free of pet hair, rips, and stains. All items will be inspected prior to acceptance. Pickup service available. 13503 SE Mill Plain Boulevard #114 Vancouver, WA 98684 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Pick up: Appointment required Email (360) 787-7144 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 787-7144 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Drop off: None Pickup: $75. A credit card number must be given in advance, but will be charged at the time of pickup. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: C-Tran: The Vine on Mill Plain Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - NW FURNITURE BANK VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NW FURNITURE BANK VANCOUVER
